response_parsed.reasoning_summary: My opinions are based on my personal experiences and values. As a Hindu, I believe in the importance of compassion and empathy towards all individuals. My occupation as a baker allows me to interact with people from different backgrounds, giving me a unique perspective on how to approach these discussions. Through cycling and cooking, I have learned the value of patience and persistence, which I apply when dealing with controversial topics like healthcare and COVID vaccines. Board games have taught me how to approach problems systematically and strategically, allowing me to make informed decisions. By considering different viewpoints and being open-minded, I strive to find common ground and reach a consensus.
